automated.check: kubectl can reach a cluster context
at least one node advertises nvidia.com/gpu capacity
Deployment vllm exists with spec.replicas >= 2 and all replicas Ready
readiness probe is httpGet /health on port 8000, not TCP
Service vllm has an external LoadBalancer IP
POST /v1/chat/completions on the external IP returns choices

manual.check: one page with three measured timings (Ready gap, scale-up chain, rollout) and actual spend
60-90s recording: pods -w during scale-up plus a streamed completion
post-teardown billing screenshot; no idle cluster left running

stretch_bonus.check: one of: tensor parallel on 2 GPUs, Kueue queue with 1-GPU quota, or Inference Gateway routing, with evidence
